title: Crispy Chawanmushi with Japanese Vegetables
description: A Japanese-style steamed egg custard with a crispy bottom and flavorful vegetables, perfect for a light and refreshing meal.

ingredients.name: japanese vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as shiitake mushrooms and green beans

instructions: Pour chawanmushi mixture into small cups or ramekins.
Add a few slices of japanese vegetables on top of the chawanmushi.
Steam for 10-12 minutes, or until the eggs are set and the vegetables are tender.
While steaming, heat a small non-stick pan with 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil and let it melt.
Carefully place the cups or ramekins onto the pan with the melted oil.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the bottom is crispy and golden brown.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
